name: Tasha's Bubbling Cauldron

placementEligibility.notes: Tasha's Bubbling Cauldron appears in an unoccupied space on the ground within 5 feet of the caster.

scaling.customFormula: The cauldron's potions improve with the slot level: Potion of Healing at level 6, Potion of Greater Healing at level 7, Potion of Superior Healing at level 8, and Potion of Supreme Healing at level 9.

effects.description: Conjure a bubbling cauldron on the ground within 5 feet for 10 minutes. The cauldron contains a number of potions of healing equal to the caster's spellcasting ability modifier (minimum of one), and each can be retrieved with a Bonus Action by a creature within 5 feet of the cauldron.

createdObjects.name: Potion of Healing
createdObjects.notes: The cauldron holds a number of Potions of Healing equal to the caster's spellcasting ability modifier (minimum 1). Each potion can be retrieved with a Bonus Action and disappears if not consumed when the spell ends.

grantedActions.action: Retrieve a Potion of Healing from the cauldron
grantedActions.notes: A creature within 5 feet of the cauldron can use a Bonus Action to draw out one of the potions the cauldron contains.

controlOptions.name: Healing potion supply
controlOptions.effect: The cauldron contains Potions of Healing equal to the caster's spellcasting ability modifier (minimum 1).

controlOptions.name: Higher-level brews
controlOptions.effect: When cast with a higher-level slot, the cauldron can instead produce stronger healing potions: Greater at level 7, Superior at level 8, and Supreme at level 9.

description: You conjure a sturdy iron cauldron, which appears in an unoccupied space on the ground within 5 feet of you and remains for the duration. The cauldron's contents are tied to the level of the spell slot expended. The cauldron contains a number of Potions of Healing equal to your spellcasting ability modifier (minimum of one potion). A creature can take a Bonus Action to retrieve a potion from the cauldron if the creature is within 5 feet of it. When the spell ends, the cauldron and any undrunk potions in it disappear.
higherLevels: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The healing potions in the cauldron become more potent: they are Potions of Greater Healing with a level 7 slot, Potions of Superior Healing with a level 8 slot, and Potions of Supreme Healing with a level 9 slot.
